data.title: Pacira BioSciences Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On March 3, 2026, Pacira BioSciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: PCRX) based in Brisbane, California, granted inducement awards to three new employees under its Amended and Restated 2014 Inducement Plan. The awards were given as a material inducement for the employees to join the company and were approved by the People & Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors without stockholder approval, following Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Pacira is known for its innovative, non-opioid pain therapies, aiming to improve the quality of life for patients.

data.title: Las Vegas A’s, Will Guidara, and Aramark Sports + Entertainment Reveal Vision for First-of-its-Kind Athletic Club Behind Home Plate of A’s New Ballpark
data.description: In Las Vegas, the Athletics, along with famed restaurateur Will Guidara and Aramark Sports + Entertainment (NYSE: ARMK), announced plans for the Athletic Club at the A’s upcoming Las Vegas stadium, slated to launch in 2028. This innovative venture will offer a unique, all-inclusive hospitality experience situated right behind home plate. Ticket sales are scheduled to commence later this month for those on the Priority Access List. The Athletic Club aims to revolutionize the conventional game-day experience.

data.title: Dream Industrial REIT Renews Normal Course Issuer Bid and Automatic Securities Purchase Plan
data.description: Dream Industrial Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: DIR.UN) disclosed its approval to undertake a normal course issuer bid on the Toronto Stock Exchange. This initiative allows the Trust to repurchase and cancel a maximum of 28,272,244 of its Units, reflecting 10% of the Trust's public float of 282,722,448 Units as of February 28, 2026. This move signifies the Trust's intentions to enhance shareholder value and optimize its capital structure.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs experienced $228M in outflows recently, but experts see stabilization in longer-term flows with early re-accumulation.
data.description: Outflows in Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) hit a three-week low, marking a concerning trend. Experts are pointing out that early stages of re-accumulation are happening as the outflows start to stabilize.

data.title: Brazilian Airline Introduces Widebody Aircraft to Expand Operations to North America and Europe
data.description: In São Paulo on March 6, 2026, GOL Linhas Aéreas, recognized as Brazil's most punctual airline, revealed plans to enhance its fleet by incorporating widebody aircraft. The airline shared news of receiving the first batch of five Airbus A330-900 planes. These aircraft can accommodate nearly 300 passengers and possess a remarkable flight range of up to 15 hours.
